headline: European business schools in charts
summary: FT experts delve into data from the upcoming 2025 European Business Schools ranking
body_text:
FT ranking experts explore the 2025 ranking data for masters in management (MiM), MBA and Executive MBA (EMBA) alumni pay by region, country and graduates’ international mobility.

Plus overseas students, gender, ESG teaching and the subjects students think schools teach best.

The 2025 European Business Schools Ranking publishes on December 1.
